focus: completeness critic: coverage-gap sweep of the 50-commit code surface + verdict inputs

findingDetails.title: Security dimension never reviewed the range's IDOR/scope-isolation hardening (memory-search.ts + memory-context.ts)
findingDetails.evidence: iter-006 (A5) read only socket-server + orchestrator; neither search/context handler appears in any iter-001..014 Files Reviewed list, yet both carry the range's primary cross-tenant data-access hardening (resolveTrustedSession IDOR guard, filterRowsByScope community fallback, resolveNoSessionAnchor). Fixes read THIS pass and confirmed sound -> process coverage gap, not a code defect.
findingDetails.recommendation: Synthesis must fold this pass's IDOR/scope read into the security-dimension coverage record and cite the fixes as Confirmed-Clean in the review-report.
findingDetails.scopeProof: memory-search.ts churn 50 + memory-context.ts churn 39 in git diff --name-only a9e9bdb0a5^..HEAD; absent from every iteration artifact's Files Reviewed
affectedSurfaceHints: review-report Confirmed-Clean section for IDOR/scope fixes

findingDetails.title: Doctor MCP scripts, deep-improvement mirror/scan scripts, sk-code comment-hygiene guard never reviewed (low-risk tooling/CI churn)

findingDetails.recommendation: Follow-on maintainability pass should spot-check check-comment-hygiene.sh before next release.
findingDetails.scopeProof: all 7 files in git diff --numstat a9e9bdb0a5^..HEAD; charter has no tooling/CI angle

findingDetails.recommendation: Follow-on pass should diff the two runtime-detection.ts copies for F-003/F-005-style drift and confirm render.ts cap-text change preserves load-bearing directives.
findingDetails.scopeProof: 3 files in range; render.ts touched only as changelog evidence; both runtime-detection.ts absent from all Files Reviewed

noveltyJustification: Coverage-critic pass surfaced 1 net-new gate-relevant P1 (security-dimension coverage gap, weight 5) + 2 net-new low-risk coverage P2 (weight 1 each). weightedNew=7, weightedTotal=7, ratio=1.0. Note: F-CC-01 is a PROCESS/coverage finding (the underlying code is correct), not new code risk; it raises the running P1 count to 5 but does not change the no-P0 / CONDITIONAL verdict.

missedP0Assertion.reasoning: All 3 P0 classes checked with positive evidence: DATA-LOSS refuted (close_db TRUNCATE-checkpoints before close, iter-005); the one real shutdown defect F-A4-01 is recoverable P1 (crash-recovery re-enqueue + boot marker repair, iter-012). SECURITY-RCE/escalation: socket TOCTOU F-A5-01 is same-uid local bounded P1 (no RCE); validator-bypass ruled out (no privileged gate); the IDOR/scope changes are FIXES that reduce cross-tenant risk and are sound (read this pass). CORRUPTION: causal engine conflict-guard/honest-count/tombstones correct (iter-004); memory-save tx atomic (iter-003); embedding-reconcile SQL uses integer-derived hasTable-validated dimTable (no injection). Every charter P0-candidate was refuted with file:line counterevidence or demoted to a bounded/recoverable P1.

strongest3: F-A4-01 (P1 correctness) unfenced ingest worker reopen-after-close_db, adversarially confirmed iter-012

recommendedVerdict.reasoning: No active P0 (asserted + substantiated) -> not FAIL. 5 active P1 (4 code: F-002/F-003/F-A4-01/F-A5-01 + 1 process F-CC-01) -> not PASS. Per promotion logic active-P1-no-P0 = CONDITIONAL. Code P1s are real/bounded/recoverable, each warrants a planned fix; F-CC-01 is satisfied by this pass's read. Verdict stable.
